customerWorkspaceDescription: Referral and group request actions are customer-only. This admin mirror keeps the page informational and does not call customer mutation endpoints.
nothingToCopyMessage: Referral data is not available yet.
subAgentCustomerOnly: Sub-agent requests are available from the customer workspace only.
groupCustomerOnly: Group-change requests are available from the customer workspace only.
loginRequiredMessage: Please sign in before submitting a request.
subAgentPendingMessage: Your pending sub-agent request is waiting for admin review.
groupPendingMessage: Your pending group-change request is waiting for admin review.
subAgentReasonRequired: Tell the team about your activity before submitting the request.
proofRequiredMessage: Attach an image proving active customers or real activity before submitting.
groupReasonRequired: Tell the team why you want to change groups.
selectGroupMessage: Choose an available target group before submitting.
subAgentSubmittedMessage: Your sub-agent request is pending admin review.
groupSubmittedMessage: Your group-change request is pending admin review.
groupFailedMessage: Unable to submit the group-change request.
subAgentDescription: Requests stay pending until admin review. If approved, your account is moved to the selected reseller group.
subAgentAlreadyPending: A sub-agent request is already pending since {{date}}.
subAgentPlaceholder: Optional notes about your customers or sales activity.
proofImageHint: Upload a screenshot showing customers or sales activity.
referralWalletDescription: Eligible referral commissions are recorded as pending earnings after confirmed customer wallet top-ups.
groupPendingNotice: Your group-change request is pending admin review.
groupOptionsNotice: Select a new active group and submit it for admin review. Your current group will not change until approval.
noGroupOptions: No other active groups are available for request right now.
groupReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to change groups?
noCommissionsDescription: Eligible commissions will appear after backend-confirmed wallet credits generate referral records.
noRequestsDescription: Submitted sub-agent or group-change requests will appear here after the backend creates them.
